settings.editor: Founded by Drs. Stalin and Yuri Borges, our practice represents the culmination of a lifelong journey dedicated to providing transformative dental care that combines cutting-edge technology with genuine compassion for every patient who walks through our doors.

At Borges Brothers Dental, you'll receive care from two exceptionally qualified dentists whose combined experience spans two continents, two dental educations, and an unwavering commitment to your oral health and satisfaction.

settings.title: Two Brothers, One Vision: Excellence in Dental Care

settings.ekit_heading_extra_title: A small river named Duden flows by their place and supplies it with the necessary regelialia. It is a paradise

settings.editor:
Born in Brazil and raised in New Jersey, brothers Stalin and Yuri Borges always shared a passion for dentistry and a dream of building something exceptional together. After earning their first dental degrees and orthodontic certificates in Brazil, they each spent a decade gaining invaluable clinical experience, starting successful practices, and serving as clinical instructors who shaped the next generation of dentists.

 

But the Borges brothers knew their journey wasn't complete. Driven by an unwavering commitment to excellence and the desire to practice in the United States, they made the bold decision to attend dental school for a second time. At Rutgers School of Dental Medicine in New Jersey, their dedication paid off with clinical awards for outstanding performance and a spotlight position recognizing their exceptional skills.

 

The brothers' dream extended beyond professional achievement—they envisioned a life in Florida where they could raise their families while building a dental practice that truly puts patients first. St. Augustine captured their hearts, and St. John's County became home. Today, Borges Brothers Dental stands as the realization of that dream: a practice where international expertise, American training, and genuine care for our community come together in every treatment we provide.

settings.ekit_heading_extra_title: A small river named Duden flows by their place and supplies it with the necessary regelialia. It is a paradise
A small river named Duden flows by their place and supplies it with the necessary regelialia. It is a paradise

settings.editor:
Dr. Stalin Borges was born in Brazil and raised in New Jersey, where his interest in dentistry first took root. He returned to his home country to pursue dental school and earn his orthodontic certificate, embarking on a rewarding decade of clinical practice that saw him start several successful practices while simultaneously serving as a clinical instructor, shaping the skills of future dentists.

 

Driven by an ambition to reach even greater heights in his profession, Dr. Borges made the significant decision to relocate back to the United States with his older brother and practice partner, Dr. Yuri Borges. He attended dental school for a second time, earning his DMD at the prestigious Rutgers School of Dental Medicine in New Jersey. During this second chapter of his education, the Borges brothers' exceptional abilities earned them both a spotlight position and a clinical award for outstanding clinical performance—a testament to their dedication and skill.

 

The dream of building a life and practice in Florida drew the brothers to St. Augustine, where Dr. Stalin Borges and his family now call St. John's County home. His international training, decade of experience, and dual dental education provide patients with a unique perspective and comprehensive expertise that few dentists can offer.

 

Outside the practice, Dr. Borges is a devoted family man who enjoys spending quality time with his wife, daughter, and their beloved Sheltie. He's an avid reader, enjoys cooking and traveling, appreciates beach days under the Florida sun, and maintains his health through regular weightlifting—all pursuits that reflect his balanced approach to life and work.

settings.ekit_heading_extra_title: A small river named Duden flows by their place and supplies it with the necessary regelialia. It is a paradise

settings.editor:
Dr. Yuri Borges shares his younger brother's remarkable journey from Brazil to New Jersey, back to Brazil for dental education, and ultimately to the United States for advanced training. Born in Brazil and raised in New Jersey, Dr. Borges returned to his home country to earn his dental degree and orthodontic certificate, launching what would become a distinguished decade of clinical practice in Brazil.

 

During those formative years, Dr. Borges not only built several successful dental practices but also served as a clinical instructor, sharing his knowledge and passion with aspiring dentists. His commitment to excellence and desire to expand his expertise led him to pursue a second dental degree in the United States, joining his brother at Rutgers School of Dental Medicine to earn his DMD.

 

The brothers' exceptional performance during their American dental education earned them both recognition through a spotlight position and a clinical award for outstanding clinical performance at Rutgers—honors that reflected their already substantial experience and unwavering dedication to the highest standards of care. With their American credentials in hand, the Borges brothers pursued their shared dream of settling in Florida with their families.

 

Today, Dr. Yuri Borges is proud to call St. Augustine home, where he and his family enjoy the vibrant community and beautiful surroundings of St. John's County. His dual education, international experience, and proven track record of clinical excellence ensure that every patient receives care informed by the best of both Brazilian and American dental training.

 

When he's not in the practice, Dr. Borges channels his discipline and determination into endurance athletics. An avid runner, he has completed numerous triathlons and marathons, including an ultramarathon in Ireland and a full marathon in the challenging Atacama Desert of Chile. 

 

These achievements reflect the same commitment to excellence he brings to his dental practice. Above all, Dr. Borges treasures time with his wife and daughter, finding balance between his professional passion and family life.

settings.editor:
Mission Statement

Transforming lives and creating smiles with high-quality care combined with the ultimate patient experience.


Vision Statement

Reliably distinguished for excellence and transparent care through great patient experience.


Cultural Statement

People first, numbers second. We believe in treating others as we would like to be treated, and together we can make a difference in our patients' lives and our community.

settings.ekit_heading_extra_title: A small river named Duden flows by their place and supplies it with the necessary regelialia. It is a paradise

settings.description_text: We approach every patient interaction with genuine empathy, understanding that dental care involves trust, vulnerability, and often anxiety that deserves our most caring attention.
Every individual who enters our practice is valued and treated with dignity, regardless of their dental history, concerns, or circumstances.
We conduct our practice with honesty in all interactions, providing truthful assessments and recommendations based solely on what serves our patients' best interests.
Clear, open communication guides everything we do, from explaining treatment options to discussing costs, ensuring patients can make informed decisions with full understanding.
Our collaborative approach extends to both our internal team and our relationship with patients, recognizing that exceptional care requires partnership.
Beyond clinical excellence, we prioritize the entire patient journey, from the moment you contact us through your follow-up care, ensuring comfort and satisfaction.
We commit to the highest standards in clinical care, continuing education, technology integration, and service delivery, never settling for "good enough."
We embrace continuous improvement in our skills, our practice, and our ability to serve patients, always seeking ways to enhance the care we provide.

settings.ekit_heading_title: What to Expect at {{Borges Brothers Dental}}
settings.ekit_heading_extra_title: A small river named Duden flows by their place and supplies it with the necessary regelialia. It is a paradise

settings.editor:
From the moment you contact our St. Augustine practice, you'll experience the difference that comes from a team genuinely committed to your comfort, understanding, and satisfaction. Our patient-centered approach means scheduling appointments that respect your time, greeting you warmly when you arrive, and ensuring you feel heard and valued throughout every interaction.

 

During your visit, we take time to listen to your concerns, answer your questions thoroughly, and explain treatment options in clear language you can understand—never rushing, never dismissing your input. Our doctors' international training and extensive experience mean you receive care informed by diverse perspectives and the latest techniques, delivered with skill honed over years of practice.

 

We've designed our office with your comfort in mind, integrating advanced technology that makes procedures more efficient and less invasive while maintaining a welcoming environment where patients of all ages feel at ease. Whether you're visiting for routine preventative care or complex restorative treatment, we'll ensure you understand every step of your care and feel confident in the treatment plan we develop together.
